list.txt: - Un sitio estupendo en el Sur de Madrid con tiendas,bares, estaciones de Metro muy cerca. El apartamento grande y limpio Una excelente experiencia

- fantastic experience! such a lovely clean and spacious house in a really nice neighbourhood - was exactly what we were looking for! great for if you’re visiting with a car as well. overall the stay was fantastic and we’d love to stay again!

- Fantastic apartment, we enjoyed our appetizers and dinners on the cosy terrace. We were 2 couples and the 2 complete bathrooms were very convenient. The apartment is spacious and quiet. It's located in a residential neighbourhood with restaurants and supermarkets walking distance. The check-in instructions were quite simple and clear. Great communication, helping us dropping our luggage and organising the transfer back to the airport The nearest underground station is 7 minutes walking, and you are in the city centre in 20 minutes. You can also take any of the bus lines which are round the corner. We also rented a car, and you can park the car inside the residential building. Thank you Laura and Victor for hosting us. Would highly recommend!

- Cute place in a nice neighborhood (Taberna 13 Cuadros on the corner was among the best meals I had), and it was close to the metro to get around the city. Everything was clean and tidy. The exposed beams and sloped ceilings are attractive but could be a problem if you are tall (I'm 5'10"/178 cm and bumped my head a couple of times). Overall, a great place for one or two people and a good value.

- Location, location, location! Staying here you get a real sense of what it would be like to live in the LA Latina area of Madrid. We were 2 couples and the space accommodated us well. To get into the apartment is a hike, a walk up with many stairs, but there is a small elevator for your bags that otherwise will fit 1 or 2 people at a time. We never minded the stairs, the rise between steps is short, and we only used the elevator for our bags. One more important benefit, Laura and Victor arranged for a taxi pick-up for us at the airport which made for an easy transition as we had had a long flight from our prior destination.

- Victor was a fantastic host: friendly, responsive, and very welcoming throughout our stay. Communication was excellent from start to finish, making everything easy and stress free. The apartment is in a great location, within walking distance of plenty of bars, restaurants, and entertainment. It was also exceptionally clean and well maintained, making it a comfortable place to stay. I highly recommend Victor’s apartment and would happily stay here again!

- We had an amazing time at Victor's place! The apartment is on a pedestrian street that includes 2 gelato/ice cream shops, a Michelin star restaurant, several tapas bars, a niche comic book shop, home goods and a florist. So much to see and do! A 1 minute walk to the El Rastro vintage market on the weekend which was a great spectacle. And lovely cafe culture/tapas culture experiences. Several grocery stores less than 3 minutes walk away and a delicious bakery on the corner - excellent "snacken" pastries and a tuna sandwich that I had to get twice. The apartment is perfect - you feel like a local. It's spacious, has a central living room, useful little kitchen and 2 very comfy bedrooms. And a large bathroom! The apartment is light and airy because every door and some of the walls are made of frosted glass. It's still private, but just something to note if the people you are sharing with are not close:) It's on the 4th floor and there is an elevator but it is very, very small.

- Fantastic location, right in the centre of beautiful historic streets and walkable to all the local bars, tapas and El Retiro park. Great communication, helping us with our transfers and local recommendations. Lovely apartment with lots of space and storage, would highly recommend!
- Great central location. No issues. Near the antique shops. So many restaurants nearby. Walked everywhere. Seamless experience.
- 너무 좋은 숙소이에요. 위치도 너무 좋아요!

- Evin konumu harikaydı. Gezip görmek isteyeceğiniz bir çok yer yürüme mesafesinde. Ev şehrin en canlı bölgesinde olduğu için çevrede 24 saat yemek yenilebilecek mekanlar var. Ev sahipleri Victor ve Laura rezervasyondan, evden ayrılana kadar bizimle çok ilgilendiler. Madrid’te konaklamak isteyenlere bu evi çok rahatlıkla tavsiye edebilirim. Ben, eşim ve 12 yaşındaki oğlum çok memnun kaldık.

- A great stay in Madrid in this lovely spacious and well-equipped apartment. The location was good for local bars and restaurants. It was walkable to many key attractions and was close to a metro station to access attractions further afield. We would recommend.

- The flat provided a great 2 night stay between flights. The flat was very comfortable and was well equipped for all our needs. It is located centrally with bars and restaurants very close by. Thank you..
- Victor was an amazing host. He was extremely nice, responsive, reliable, and communicative. He helped us throughout our entire stay and made us feel very comfortable and was very supportive.

- We had an excellent stay at this Airbnb in Madrid. The place was exactly as described—clean, comfortable, and very well maintained. The location was perfect: easy access to restaurants, cafes, public transportation, and many of Madrid’s main attractions. The host was responsive, helpful, and made check-in and check-out seamless. The apartment was quiet, well equipped, and felt like a true home base after long days exploring the city. I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting Madrid.
- Good location in La Latina, Madrid is in plain city in the apartment and everything you need.

- A casa é aconchegante e do tamanho ideal para grupos pequenos. Destaco o isolamento de som em um bairro com um movimento grande. A única questão menos alinhada às fotos é quanto à privacidade do banheiro que tem porta de vidro jateado e é sensível ao som, vale entender se tudo bem por quem está nacasa. A casa é limpa e organizada, com tudo que se precisa para uma estadia curta. Victor e Laura são muito atenciosos e gentis.
- Très bel appartement bien situé à Madrid! Nous étions très satisfaits.

- Un très bel appartement, très bien équipé et idéalement situé à Latina, quartier vivant , avec beaucoup de sites majeurs de Madrid accessibles à pied . Les hôtes sont réactifs aux demandes et attentifs à ce que tout se passe bien . Un point d’attention, les portes des chambres sont en verre poli et coulissantes . L’isolation phonique et lumineuse , quand toute la famille n’est pas couchée est moyenne . Malgré ce point nous recommandons pleinement.
- Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt.
- Excellent, clean spacious and near good amenities. Comfortable beds. Maybe bigger pillows.

- très bon séjour a Madrid, appartement très propre au pied du métro . Quartier vivant très agréable. Le seul petit bémol est que la salle de bain avec les toilettes (séparés par une porte bien sur) donnent directement sur la pièce principale. sinon parfait
- Excellent location and beautiful space. Very comfortable and conveniently located. Thanks again Victor.
- Great location, 20 minute walk to Pardo and Real Palace. Its on the 4 th floor but there is a lift. Lots of restaurants and 2 grocery stores a block away
- fabulous apartment. & a great host. we would 100% stay here again

- Everything was great! Beautiful spacious aparment with nice and cozy living room, great for hanging out. You can walk to most of the major sights in Madrid. Green market and big store is just around the corners also all good bars and restaurants are couple of minutes away. We would definitely come back here!
- Good apartment in a great location! Would stay again.

- WE LOVE THIS APARTMENT! LOCATION IS ON POINT! Clean and very nice apartment with big bathroom. Safe neighborhood, Location is walking distance to most attractions : plaza mayor, royal palace, plaza del sol, mercado de San Miguel, cathedral,etc. lots of restaurants, cafes, bars in the area- Host is great! Arrived a few hours early to drop off luggages and Laura let us checked in early since apartment was ready.! Communicating with Laura was a breeze. We would love to stay here again.

- Really enjoyed my stay! I saw previous guests mentioned the noise but I wasn’t bothered by much noise at all. The apartment had everything I needed and I felt safe. The neighborhood is awesome for small cafes and cool restaurants. If you don’t mind walking 20-30 min, you can reach the main tourist attractions or you can pop into the metro station, which is across the street. The host was able to accommodate dropping off my luggage early and provided me with a lot of information in advance. Great value, no feedback
- Nice apartment in a convenient location. An added feature is that the apartment is located away from the main street, so it is quiet when you want to sleep!
- A lovely and quiet apartment along a lively street! We would definitely stay again :)

- We had such a wonderful stay. Laura and Victor were so nice and responsive. The place was cozy and had everything we needed. The location was perfect. There were so many restaurants and shops within walking distance. Even with so many things around, the area was peaceful. We walked to so many places and had some great meals at the local restaurants. The Greek yogurt place right down the street was our favorite for a late night dessert. I would definitely stay again if I come back to Madrid.

- Victor’s accommodation was perfect for our trip to Madrid! Location wise, the place is right in the center of a lot of the night life, from awesome restaurants open late to bars for some drinks. A majority of the sights we wanted to visit were very walkable in all directions as well, making this the perfect central hub for our stay! For the stay itself, it is wonderfully furnished and quite comfortable for a couple, and we enjoyed staying in at times just to enjoy the space. Thank you, Victor, for hosting us, and we would highly recommend others stay here as well!
- Muy lindo el departamento y el trato de ellos! La zona está buena porque llegas a todos lados caminando y a lugares muy culturales.
- Great location and communication!
- We hebben genoten en een fijn verblijf gehad. De locatie was echt super en is centraal.
- Great location, very walkable.
- Very nice place, close to everything. I would definitely go back!
- Great location and in midst of busy area but flat itself is quiet, no view am afraid everything else is great and available. Great stay thanks

- Die Wohnung ist mit viel Liebe zum Detail absolut perfekt eingerichtet und sieht genauso aus wie auf den Fotos! Die Lage ist super zentral fußläufig zu allen Sehenswürdigkeiten in einem schönen Viertel mit Cafes, Rastaurants und kleinen Geschäften. Aber dennoch ist die Wohnung ruhig mit Balkon zum Innenhof gelegen. Victor und Laura haben uns mit wichtigen Infos versorgt und waren perfekte Gastgeber! Wir haben uns super wohl gefühlt und würden jederzeit wieder dort übernachten!

- Super fint boende i ett härligt område, mycket lugnt kvarter precis lagom med butiker, restauranger och livlighet. Gångavstånd till allt vi hade planerat att upptäcka, mycket tacksamt. Nära till restauranger som sagt men även till mindre livsmedelsbutiker. Boendet var i nyskick och otroligt fräscht precis som på bilder och i beskrivning. Bra utrustat med en trevlig balkong! Värdarna var super hjälpsamma och trevliga när vi hade frågor och funderingar😊otroligt boende!

- Wir hatten einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt in Madrid! Die Unterkunft war sauber, gemütlich und genau wie beschrieben. Die Lage ist perfekt, um die Stadt zu erkunden, und die Kommunikation mit dem Gastgeber war jederzeit freundlich und unkompliziert. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt und würden jederzeit wiederkommen. Absolut empfehlenswert!

- A true gem of a place in central Madrid with so many restaurants and attractions within walking distance. Clean, modern and well-decorated apartment with everything we needed. Easy check in process with lovely responsive hosts. Would not hesitate to stay again.
- Excelente lugar con todas las comodidades para dos personas , ideal si quieres estar en un barrio tranquilo y con muchas cosas que hacer
- My husband and I enjoy our stay here. The description of the location was pretty accurate. The bed was extremely comfortable and cozy. Thank you!
- Very nice apartment. Even better location. Exactly as described and shown in pictures.
- Apartamento acogedor, pequeño pero con todo perfectamente diseñado y ordenado
- Laura and Victor are the best hosts. Wonderful visit. Everything is walkable from the apartment.

- Appartement très bien situé idéal pour un long week-end à Madrid. Proche des lieux à visiter, des resto/bars, métro proche pour accès aéroport. Instructions très claires de Victor/Laura pour accéder à l’appartement

- This Airbnb was perfect for 1 person for 2 weeks or could be good for 2 people for less time. The location was amazing and it was easy to get in and out of the place. It was so clean. I would describe the space as an elevated hotel room with the mini kitchen. I didn’t find myself using it to cook there. The balcony faces a closed in courtyard but I think it allowed for quieter evenings.
- Beautiful home in the best location. The apartment is super quiet, despite being located in a lively neighborhood & right in the center, in close proximity to some of Madrid‘s most popular sites.

- Nous avons passé un excellent moment dans ce logement ! Tout était parfaitement conforme aux photos et à la description : propre, très bien situé et confortable. Un grand merci à Laura et Victor pour leur accueil. Ils ont été d'une réactivité exemplaire tout au long de notre séjour. Nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir !
- todo excelente!...muy cómodo el departamento...

- Thanks Victor. What a great stay. Perfectly described, easy to access, right in the middle of a lovely neighbourhood of Madrid with superb nearby restaurants, very walkable to all the main sights. Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting to stay there. We were a couple on a 5 day Madrid stay, the centrally located apartment added to the enjoyment and ease of the stay.

- I had a great time in Madrid. The apparent’s location is absolutely brilliant, you can walk anywhere. And you have plenty of restaurants around. The apparent was a bit smaller than I expected but it was not a problem, it was comfortable and nicely organized, clean and smart.
- Great stay in Madrid. Apartment well designed and good communication from hosts. Also great location with lots of main attractions within walking distance.

- El alojamiento cumplió totalmente con nuestras expectativas. Era cómodo, amplio, limpio y moderno. Los niños gozaron la terraza que tenía un pasto sintético y el subterráneo con juegos (el taca taca fue una sensación). El barrio era muy seguro, bonito, con negro a 5 minutos caminando y muchas tiendas donde comprar de todo para la vida. Laura y Víctor excelentes, respondieron siempre rápido aunque durante la estadía no tuvimos ningún problema. También Patricia quien nos recibió y nos explicó todo el funcionamiento súper paciente y amable. En definitiva volveríamos sin dudarlo!

- Me senti em casa durante toda a estadia. Fiquei com minha família e adoramos tudo! A localização é excelente, muito perto da estação de trem, cerca de 400 metros de caminhada. A casa estava impecável: tudo muito limpo, organizado e bem cuidado. Ambiente confortável, acolhedor e exatamente como nas fotos. Com certeza voltaríamos e recomendamos para quem procura praticidade e conforto.

- We had a fantastic stay in Madrid! The apartment was spotless, spacious, and exactly as described. There was plenty of room to relax, and everything was exceptionally clean and well maintained. One of my favorite features was the shower in the primary bedroom, which felt luxurious after long days of sightseeing. The location was also incredibly convenient. There was a market nearby for groceries and essentials, and we were just a short walk from a huge shopping mall with plenty of stores and dining options. For football fans, the stadium is directly across the street, which was a really fun and unique bonus. Overall, this was a comfortable, convenient, and enjoyable place to stay, and I would absolutely recommend it to anyone visiting Madrid.
- Great host!
- I cannot express just how amazing this place is. It is beautiful, and Victor is an excellent host! He was so helpful and quick to respond. If you get to stay here, you’re fortunate indeed!

- We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Victor and Laura’s Airbnb in Madrid. The location was perfect (just a quick 6–7 minute walk to the Pacífico Metro station). From there we could be almost anywhere in central Madrid within 20 minutes. It made exploring the city incredibly easy and convenient. The accommodation itself was spotless, beautifully maintained, and very well furnished with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The attention to detail really stood out. One unexpected highlight was the foosball table on the bottom floor, which was such a fun added bonus after long days of sightseeing. The neighborhood was also a huge plus. Quiet, safe, and relaxing, while still being well connected to the heart of the city. Victor and Laura were fantastic hosts, and we truly could not recommend their place enough to anyone visiting Madrid. We would gladly stay here again!
- Increíble piso y trato de Víctor y laura. Siempre pendientes y atentos.
- 컨디션도 좋고 너무 깨끗했습니다.

- Wir waren sehr zufrieden und uns hat es sehr gefallen in der Unterkunft, in der Zukunft würden wir dort aufjedenfall wieder hin. Nur ein kleiner Hinweis , das man vielleicht auch Bilder machen könnte von dem Keller in dem es ein Tischkicker gibt. Wir haben diesen erst am vorletzten Abend entdeckt da wir dachten das es nach unten nur in die Tiefgarage geht 😅 Vielen Dank für alles, sehr weiter zu empfehlen! 🤝🏽
- Un apartamento increíble para pasar unos días en Madrid en una zona tranquila y al mismo tiempo cercana a todos los lugares de interés de la ciudad. Sin duda, repetiremos! :)

- When we arrived, Patricia was friendly and helpful. She helped us with the keys and working the code to get into the house. She also showed us around the kitchen to explain how the washer, dryer and dishwasher worked. The early check in for our luggage allowed us to explore the city without hassle. We were shocked that there were 3 full bathrooms and so much space for 5 people. Our Spanish family was amazed with the size and location of the house. The room darkening shades were a nice surprise as well. After long days of walking and exploring, it felt like we were coming home each time we walked in the door.

- Fantastic location close to metro. House was fantastic, nicely furnished and lots of cute bakeries and restaurants around. Super peaceful and quiet, but close to everything (walkable and easy metro hop)

- Victor’s apartment was great. It was comfortable and had all the amenities that we needed. The neighborhood is quiet and good for families. The hosts were friendly and easy to reach. Great place to stay when visiting Madrid.

- Quiet development with a small park in front where families gather in the evenings to relax. This is a multi-level townhouse/condo with modern, clean and updated finishes, although there are design limitations for the elderly. Location is in the Retiro neighborhood (east of Retiro Park), so expect slightly longer distances to get to anything. But if you're looking for a quiet night's rest, this is the spot. Plenty of restaurants and convenience/grocery stores nearby. The bedroom locations are as advertised, but note that there are relatively steep stairs (19 steps). So it's not just a concern for children but for elderly folk staying in the upstairs ensuite bedroom. There are even steeper stairs heading into the basement/play room (which has a futsal table). Nobody used the playroom given the stairs. The full bathroom on the 1st floor with no corresponding bedroom on the same level is also quite awkward. Bathrooms are also small and hard to use.

- Sehr schöne und geschmackvoll eingerichtete Wohnung. Waren mit allem sehr zufrieden. Die Küche ist sehr gut ausgestattet und drei Bäder in der Wohnung sind natürlich ein Traum. Vielen Dank die die gute Kommunikation an Laura.
- Excelente alojamiento y excelentes anfitriones, sin duda regresaría, el alojamiento muy limpio y cómodo, cuenta con todo lo necesario y está relativamente cerca de las zonas turísticas.

- Really enjoyed our stay at Victor’s place. Apartment was clean and matched the description. Very quiet and good spot if you’re looking to be in more of a residential neighborhood than in the tourist center. Victor was incredibly responsive
- Excelente!!! Muy cómodo vale la pena y si vuelvo a Madrid me gustaría hospedarme nuevamente con Victor

- Queremos dar las gracias a Victor y a Laura por ofrecernos un alojamiento increíble en Madrid. Desde el primer momento, la comunicación fue perfecta y estuvieron pendientes de nosotros en todo momento, lo que hizo que nos sintiéramos muy cómodos y bien atendidos. La casa es espectacular: cómoda, acogedora y cuidada hasta el último detalle. Tiene absolutamente todo lo necesario (y mucho más) para que la experiencia sea perfecta. Gracias por brindarnos una estancia tan agradable en Madrid. Sin duda, repetiremos.

- El lugar tiene una ubicación perfecta. Tiene todo lo necesario muy cómodo pero sobretodo muy seguro por qué el lugar es muy tranquilo. Nos encantó 🩷 totalmente te omen dado el Lugar si tienes niños y personas mayores en el grupo

- Séjour parfait ! Le logement est conforme à la description et très spacieux. Il est situé tout proche d’une station de métro. Victor et très réactif et a répondu à toutes nos questions rapidement. Je recommande !

- Victor made the process easy to check in and was flexible with us. We were a family of 5 and plenty of space. Place looked like the pictures and was extremely clean. Nice neighborhood and very safe. Very close to the metro and many good local restaurants. It’s easy to get to Madrid via the metro. Our family would gladly stay there again.
- Todo perfecto.

- Everything was great!The house was beautiful, clean and well organised! The area was also very nice and very close to the metro station!I would definitely recommend it and I would love to come back!

- Sehr schönes Haus und definitiv den Preis wert. Die Kommunikation verlief gut, da man Victor auch per Telefon erreichen konnte. Man ist zudem schnell in der Stadt. Da wir den Flug am Abend hatten, durften wir sogar länger drin bleiben. Ich werde definitiv wieder kommen.
- Local espetacular Melhor que o anúncio

- Odalar konforluydu. Yeteri kadar büyük. Orta- iyi mobilyalar kullanılmış. Muhit de iyi hissettirdi. Şehir merkezine çok yakın değil. Odalarda anahtarlı kilit yok. Bu italyada yaygın galiba. 2 banyo tuvalet var. Bu 4 kişilik bir aile için iyi.
- Great place and communicative host
- Logement propre et idéal pour 6 personnes. À 5 minutes à pieds du métro qui mène en 10 minutes au centre ville. Lave-linge très pratique.
- Una excelente opción para quedarse, muy cómodo y completo para varios ocupantes.

- A estadia foi ótima! Muito bem localizada, perto do metro, serviços e pontos turísticos. A casa é muito silenciosa e confortável. As fotos indicam com exatidão como a casa é. Os anfitriões respondem rápido e são muito gentis. Ficaria hospedada novamente.
- Tinha tudo o que precisávamos na casa, recomendo

- We had a great weekend, the property was very clean and had everything we needed. Easy to walk to the Metro station. Photos and description of the property was accurate. Would definitely recommend!!

- Excelente casa, todo impecable, súper limpio, barrio seguro , cerca del metro y bus, camas cómodas , regadera excelente con agua caliente todo el tiempo , cocina equipada , muy amplia y cómoda para 6 personas que fuimos , el anfitrión responde mensajes para dar sugerencias donde comer, todo perfecto

- We had a wonderful stay at this Madrid home. It was as depicted in photos and SO spacious. Pretty, modern furniture and loved the privacy of the patio area. It’s an entire townhome for guests! It’s in a fairly quiet area of the city and accessible to metro or bus; and close to restaurants and grocery/ supermarket. Laura and Victor were also communicative and welcoming.
- A szallas rendkivul jo helyen talalhato . Mind a lakas mind a kapcsolattartas kivalo !!

- The place was spotlessly clean, spacious, well equipped. My (adult) children commented that it felt like a hotel. We only ate breakfast there as were out for the majority of both days we were there but everything worked perfectly. Communication was excellent and there were no problems at all. Would recommend.

- Victor's home was Amazing! We were a family of 6 with a 1 year old and a 67 year old and the home was easily navigatable for all. There are no baby gates but you just have to watch your baby and you'll be fine. Some of the best parts about Victor's place is the home had all the amenities to cook, clean, relax and do laundry, which is super important with little ones. There was a pack'n play, but we didnt use it. There is a small park right outside the door which the locals frequent and your kids will love. The home is super close to the metro and the bus that can take you anywhere with the help of Google maps. There were plenty of yummy coffee shops, supermarkets, pharmacies and a gas station in the neighborhood. We loved it and would definitely stay here again.

- Excelente lugar, súper limpio y muy buena zona. Frente a un pequeño parque. Definitivamente uno de los mejores lugares donde hemos estado, solamente a una calle y media del metro hace que sea muy buen lugar. Me volvería a hospedar ahí!
- the space was awesome, the hosts were very responsive. we'll be back.

- Een heel prettig verblijf gehad in dit appartement. Het is duidelijk met zorg ingericht: luxe uitstraling, brandschoon en voorzien van moderne, nieuwe apparatuur. Alles wat je nodig hebt is aanwezig, wat het verblijf erg comfortabel maakt. De locatie is echt een groot pluspunt. De straat zelf is rustig, waardoor je ’s avonds goed kunt ontspannen, maar om de hoek zit je direct bij de metro, winkels en diverse restaurants. Ideale combinatie van rust en levendigheid. Ook het contact met de host was top: snel, duidelijk en prettig. Al met al een echte aanrader voor wie comfortabel wil verblijven op een toplocatie.
- We were a group of 5 people and really enjoyed living in Victor and Laura's place.

- Le logement de Victor est vraiment bien équipée et est très confortable. Les instructions de Victor sont super claires. Nous étions 6 et avons passé un super beau séjour à Madrid. Nous sommes arrivés au beau milieu d’un orage et avons pu laisser nos bagages dans le logement, meme si nous etions d'avance. Super bons restos tout près, métro à 3 minutes de marche, il y a littéralement tout dans le quartier. Merci à Victor et Laura pour leur accueil et leur instructions.
- This place was perfect. Great location, right near the park. Lots of restaurants nearby. Definitely recommend!
- muy bonito lugar
- ruim huis om te vertoeven met kinderen en prima om stad te verkennen.
- good

- I cannot recommend Victor's apartment highly enough. My friends and I had a wonderful stay in Madrid and the apartment was the perfect base for us to explore. It is located in a lovely peaceful neighbourhead and it is beautifully presented, spotlessly clean and very comfortable. It is close to Metro links and there are shops and restaurants close by. Victor was extremely helpful and welcoming throughout and all the information that he provided when we booked and just before our arrival was reassuring and much appreciated. Being able to stay in such a lovely apartment really made our long weekend so enjoyable.

- Can't praise this property and hosts Laura and Victor enough! From start to finish the whole process was made so easy by great communication with the hosts. They provided clear instructions about getting to and staying in the property and included a wealth of other useful documents. The apartment itself is even better than in the photos, spacious, comfortable, airy. Having 3 bathrooms is great, underfloor heating was lovely. The location is brilliant for exploring Madrid, about 30 minutes walk to Retiro park, and easily accessible to other areas of the city via the metro with the nearest metro stop (pacifico) being about 5 minutes walk away. Would definitely recommend this property and these hosts!
- 房源位于一个安静的街区 距离火车站 开车仅需7分钟。入住便捷，适合家庭出行。
- Sehr schöne Unterkunft, sehr sauber und alles reibungslos abgelaufen. Victor ist ein toller Gastgeber und hat sich um alles gut gekümmert. Ich freue mich auf ein wiederkommen in diese Unterkunft.
- Great stay!
- 清潔感がありとても快適だった。必要なものは大抵揃っていた。
- alles perfekt, werden wieder dort nächtigen wenn wir nach Madrid kommen!

- Victor’s place was ideal for our family. Plenty of space, nice decoration and a wonderful patio that we really wanted to enjoy more. Sadly it was rainy while we were there. We highly recommend this place and we’ll check it out again when we come back to Madrid.
- Overall, great place with fantastic walkability to restaurants/shopping/cafe

- We had a wonderful stay at Victor’s apartment in Madrid. The location was excellent—close to everything we wanted to see and in vibrant Chueca. The apartment itself was spacious, modern, and stylish, making it a very comfortable place to relax after exploring the city. Victor was also very responsive and communicated clearly throughout our stay, making check-in and everything else easy. We would happily stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting Madrid.

- Victor's place was in a centrally located, walkable to most places and sites and shopping. Lots of great food options nearby. The place was very comfortable, clean and spacious. We recommend this place. However, there was construction that sounded like jack hammers in the floor above us that occurred in the morning and some afternoons. Of course this is not something that Victor can control but due to timing of our stay.
- Great location, lively neighbourhood (so a bit noisy as expected), very nice apartment, good beds, good amenities, good communication, easy check-in and out.
- The location was perfect! We could walk everywhere. There was a wonderful bakery and a supermarket just a few doors down. The balconies were fun for coffee and wine.
- Execelente Recomendado 💯
- MARVELOUS IN EVERY WAY!!! The best central location to visit all parts of Madrid, beautifully furnished and equipped. I recommend most highly. Truly wonderful.
- Très bien situé dans un quartier qui bouge, l’appartement est bien entretenu et Victor très réactif et aidant.

- Victor and his team were great to work with. The apartment was as expected and in a great location. We were about a 5-15 min walk from all the main attractions. Very close to Gran Vie but far enough away to get out of the business. I highly recommend this location, not only for the location but for how easy it was to communicate with Victor. We look forward to visiting Madrid again.

- What a beautiful homely apartment in a cool location. It had everything we needed and provided a wonderful base from which to explore Madrid. Thank you Victor & Team! We loved our stay. Your Airbnb was perfect for us! 😀
- Great cozy apartment near Gran Via. Very walkable and a supermarket right next door.
- Ich würde jederzeit wieder kommen. Alles bestens.
- TODO MUY BIEN

- Realmente todo perfecto. 100% recomendable. La zona muy buena porque es tranquila pero está cerca de todo. El dpto es ideal para una familia de 4 con dos baños completos. La cocina está bien equipada y tiene lavadora y lavavajillas. Víctor fue muy amigable y nos permitió hacer late checkout que nos permitió disfrutar nuestro último día hasta que salimos al aeropuerto.

- Victor’s apartment is just steps away from the bustling Gran Via. The street that it is on is quiet enough that it’s peaceful but not a ghost town either. There are a number of local amenities nearby and everything is walkable. The flat itself is more spacious than the pictures provide and we were greeted by the cleaning lady as we arrived, so the apartment was spotless. Would recommend this apartment for people who want to get out and explore this amazing city. There is no lift so it may not be suitable for families with very young children who require a buggy or someone with mobility issues.
- Amazing location!! Loved being in walking distance to so many great cafes and shops. Comfy beds and very easy entry/exit system. Flexible checkin/check out. Thanks!

- Valoramos especialmente la atención de Víctor y Laura. Gracias por estar en todos los detalles. El departamento es mucho más de lo que se puede apreciar en imágenes. Muy contentos. Es un lugar tranquilo y es muy fácil de acceder. Está en la mejor ubicación. Todo cerca. Gracias !!!

- We enjoyed our stay here and would recommend anyone who wants a central location. It is within walking distance of all the great shops and has an abundance of close bars and restaurants nearby. The only slight issue we had was with the noise coming from the bar below til late if you sleep in the front bedroom. Other than that well worth the stay here.
- Terrific place in a terrific location

- We really enjoyed our stay at Víctor & Laura’s apartment! They were very wonderful hosts! The home was in a fabulous location - so many local food & coffee shops yet walkable to shopping on the Gran Via, Prado Museum, San Miguel Market and more! It was stylish, comfortable and very well maintained! Would definitely come back. Highly recommend !

- Victor's place was in a great location, very walkable to everywhere we wanted to go. Their were tons of restaurants within a block or two, a fantastic cafe for pastries and coffee across the street, and a market right next door. The layout of the apartment worked well for us as the two bedrooms were on opposite ends of the apartment. Plenty of space for 2-3 people. Only negative (not Victor's fault) was the person who lives on the floor above. They seemed to be up at all hours of the night, and you could hear them pacing the apartment from end to end. Sleep ended up being difficult, even after using sound machines. Aside from that the apartment itself and location were wonderful.
- Location was perfect. Very close to La Gran Vía and Chueca Plaza. Apartment was very quiet despite being on a first floor. Mini Market downstairs made it a great find!
- Easy check in great location and clean apartment

- Departamento excelente. Super cómodo, grande y completo. A solo 2 cuadras de la Gran Via y a pocas del Metro. Siempre estuvieron dispuestos ante cualquier inquietud. Para acceder hay una escalera hasta el primer piso, no es muy complicada. Gracias por todo!!!!
- Wonderful apartment in an ideal location. Responsive host. They have a great driver on the team, too. Great place to stay for my family of 2 adults and 2 teens.

- Spacious apartment in a fantastic location. Well decorated, clean, and had all amenities you could need. Victor was also very responsive. There was a fun digital door code that we could access from our phones. We had a great stay and I would recommend this apartment to anyone!
- Great central location, the apartment was exactly as described and would certainly stay again
- Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans le logement de Victor. Très bien situé, le logement correspond parfaitement à la description. Super communication, Merci !

- Comfortable, clean apartment located in a great area of Madrid with many restaurants, coffee shops and other shops nearby. The hosts were responsive and very clear in their instructions. We really enjoyed the stay.

- He estado alojada en este alojamiento durante 12 días y la experiencia ha sido muy buena. Victor ha sido muy atento, amable y rápido en responder a cualquier duda o necesidad. Todo ha sido tal y como se describe en el anuncio. Me he sentido muy cómoda durante mi estancia y volveré sin dudarlo. Muy recomendable!

- Victor’s place was absolutely amazing! The place was clean, tidy and better than the photos show! The price was great! especially for easter weekend and overall the communication from Victor and his Co-host was amazing! Thanks for letting us stay!

- Victor and Laura, my family and I are very grateful to you for all your support during our stay in Spain. This made our local trips to other cities much easier, and of course, we had a wonderful time in Madrid. We are taking away the best memories and experiences. We love your country and your people. We plan to return soon. Isabel, Leo, and Valerie
- loved it
- Excelente ubicación, cerca de todo pero tranquilo para dormir sin ruidos. Recomendable 100%

- We stayed at Victor’s for 10 days. The location of the apartment is 10/10. Walking distance to everywhere. Lots of restaurants, shops, things to do nearby. Although the neighborhood is pretty lively, the street is very quiet itself. The master room has a great size, the second bedroom accommodates two people. The apartment is very comfortable and clean.
- We had a really lovely stay! The apartment was cosy, in a great location and affordable.

- We had an amazing stay as a group of 4! More than enough room, looks exactly like the photos. Great location and very walkable. Victor was incredibly responsive and friendly as well, highly recommend! The only note is the elevator was not working during our stay, housekeeping did help us up during check in however we had to carry luggage down both flights of steps for checkout, but other than that, our stay was perfect!
- Our stay here was absolutely fantastic. It was so comfortable, quiet and everything we could need. Great location and our hosts were helpful and friendly. We couldn’t have asked for more.

- Victor’s apartment was great. The location was super central, the space was really nice, and everything went very smoothly. Victor was also very responsive over text throughout the stay. I’d definitely stay here again and would absolutely recommend it to anyone visiting Madrid!

- Victor was great to work with. He as very responsive to questions and always provided clear information. He even helped direct us how to best navigate the city and gave us good suggestions on places to visit.
- Sehr schöne Wohnung. Top Lage! Viele Sehenswürdigkeiten super gut zu Fuss erreichbar.
- 숙소도 깨끗하고 사진이랑 컨디션도 똑같아요!! 위치도 좋고 집도 넓어서 편안하게 쉬고 갑니다!
- Beautiful Apt. Great location! Excellent host Will stay here again in the future
- We really enjoyed our stay. The apartment is in a fantastic location and Victor was very helpful organising our taxi to the airport - thank you!
- Very nice apartment in the heart of the city! Everything is exactly as the pictures, we will definitely return. 🤗

- The apartment very much suited our needs with large lounge dining area to relax in and two big bedrooms with own bathrooms separated by the lounge area. Location was fantastic - very central to all key sites as well as lots of bars and restaurants and food shops. Victor and Laura were easy to deal with and flexible re times.

- We loved this beautiful 2 bedroom apartment in Madrid. Very well appointed and comfortable, with great space and light. Conveniently located near shopping and restaurants. Close to Gran Via but surprisingly very peaceful and quiet as the previous reviews said. Quite cozy! Victor was incredibly responsive. I would stay here again if our travels take us back to Madrid.

- El apartamento es muy, muy bonito, silencioso y bien situado. Mejor de lo que se ve en las fotos. El ascensor podría ser más fácil, ya que se abre con llave y solo cabe una persona. La tv es muy difícil conectar los canales, hay que buscarlos por orden alfabético y no pudimos hacerlo. Y el radiador del baño para las toallas no se encendía. Pero las habitaciones son muy amplias y cómodas para guardar la ropa. Pienso que es un apartamento estupendo para gente joven.
- Un alojamiento bastante completo, limpio, acogedor y en una de las mejores zonas de Madrid! Mi familia y yo quedamos encantados durante nuestra estancia. Gracias Lau y Víctor!
- Perfekt beliggenhet og veldig koselig leilighet.
- Fantástico !! Muito próximo a Gran Via, permitindo fazer todo o centro a uma curta caminhada. A rua é bem tranquila com boas opções de restaurantes. Muito limpo e prático . Uma ótimo escolha !!
- Excelente localização e apto muito bom, tudo muito limpo, exatamente conforme descrição. Laura e Victor são excelentes anfitriões. Gostamos muito. Vale a estadia.
- simplemente espectacular todo

- This apartment is in an ideal location, walking distance to everything and close to muni & Sol train station. Loved having the window doors open when awake to hear the people on the streets and when we closed the windows and shutters with AC I was pleasantly surprised that noise was blocked. Apartment is spacious and clean, albeit the living room furniture is well loved. Victor & Laura were great communicators and arranged a taxi pick up for us for an early morning flight. We felt safe here and loved our time in Madrid.
- great apartment. bright and airy.
- Great place! Great location! Very nice apartment! Spacious!
- Beautiful apartment in a great location! We loved our stay, which was perfect for our first time in Spain…very hospitable, and loved walking around to all the sites!

- Victor’s place is well suited for a few days in the city. The location is central and safe. Victor is a wonderful host. One thing to note is that the second bathroom is detached from the second bedroom and has a small shower area. However, that didn’t impact our stay.

- We loved this apt! It was just as described in the pictures and on the Airbnb website. The beds were comfortable and the best part was that the location was perfect. There were plenty of cafes and shops closely. Laura was extremely helpful in arranging our transportation from the airport. She always responded immediately which was so nice after a long trip. We had a little difficulty opening the door so Laura took care of that for us. It's a great apartment and we highly recommend it.
- Great location close, walkable to all the sights.

- Stayed at Victor and Laura's place February 23 - 26th. Absolutely loved our stay there. The apartment was beautiful and spacious in a perfect part of town. Loved the fact that the bedrooms are on opposite ends of the apartment. Being in the heart of downtown made everything walkable with tons of restaurants and things to do nearby. Victor and Laura were super responsive with any questions or issues that arose. Thank you for a lovely stay!
- Perfect apartment for a city break weekend, close location to museums and the palace
- Everything was perfect..the host ,an apartment and Madrid were faboluos.
- 位置正如房东说的那样，非常方便但有很安静，闹中取静。第一天由于火车晚点，很晚才到，在马德里度过了愉快的三天。要注意的是电梯距离房屋还有半层楼的距离。
- Excelente lugar y ubicación.

- After a few days in Sevilla we returned to Victor and Laura's place March 2 - 4th. Our stay was perfect! Loved how responsive Victor and Laura were and that they offered to provide transport to and from the airport which made things much easier when you are arriving in a foreign country for the first time. Check in's were also flexible. Thank you for making our stay perfect!

- The apartment is located in a very good location. Close to mayor touristic spots. The furniture is not spotless but very functional. The apartment is large, clean and comfortable. We had an issue using the washing machine. The host didn't know it was broken and we couldn't finish washing our laundry. But the he took care of getting our laundry cleaned. I would recommend checking with the host if the issue has bern fixed before doing laundry.
- La zona es un 10 ! , el departamento es amplio y con todas las prestaciones necesarias. Víctor fu muy amable en el intercambio que tuvimos por mensajes . Lugar recomendable .

- Es un departamento muy lindo. Impecable y bien cuidado,. Está ubicado en un barrio lindisimo de Madrid , frente a una plaza y a metros del Palacio Real Laura y Víctor fueron muy buenos anfitriones . Muy resolutivos Les estamos muy agradecido pasamos muy lindos momentos en su departamento

- El departamento cumplió con las expectativas. Nos alojamos 4 huéspedes y estuvimos muy cómodos. Las habitaciones, los lugares de guardado, la cocina, todo estaba muy completo y fácil de utilizar. El lavavajillas, el lavarropas y el secarropas son muy útiles para estadías largas. A metros del Teatro Real y el Palacio, frente a una plaza muy tranquila el entorno es muy agradable. Tal vez lo único negativo es que el departamento es un poco oscuro por tratarse de una unidad interna, pero si estas de paseo seguramente no pases mucho tiempo dentro del departamento. En conclusión es un excelente apartamento para alojarse en Madrid.
- Great place, looked just like the photos. Beds were really comfortable. Location was great, it was quiet but easy to walk everywhere. Would definitely stay again.

- The place was so clean and everything is provided. The location was just beside the royal palace also is near the other attractions I didn’t needed much transportation during my stays un less is far from the center which you can use the metro. My only comment is about the elevator was scared to use it.
- Great location. Lots to do

- The location is hard to beat and we really enjoyed our stay! Great restaurants nearby and within steps of the palace, parks and amazing things to do! Hosts were immensely responsive and helpful with any questions we had.

- We thoroughly enjoyed our time and highly recommend it. It's all about location, location, location. This had it all . A cozy street with a park out the front door. Neighborhood shops and restaurants. Just a few steps from The Palace, Gallery, walking tours, etc. The only complaint (and outside the control of the host) was that there was work being done to the exterior of the building. We were awoken by men on scaffolding right outside our bedroom "window" a couple of the days. This annoyance will hopefully and probably have gone away by the time you read this. We would stay here again .

- It was a lovely apartment in one of the most beautiful parts of Madrid. The apartment was furnished to our needs and was very clean. The check-in instructions were quite simple and clear. We had a very comfortable check-in and check-out process. Communication was excellent. Thank you Laura and Victor for hosting us. Greetings from Istanbul
- We hebben een hele mooie tijd gehad, ik raad dit zeker aan!

- Espaço muito agradável e com uma localização central. O apartamento estava limpo e preparado para nos receber. Pena um dos quartos ser interior e não ter janela mas para uns dias funciona muito bem.

- Excelente estadia; localização maravilhosa, bem ao lado do Palácio Real; anfitriões muito simpáticos que enviaram instruções bem claras; noa ajudaram com o transfer do aeroporto; voltando a Madrid, ficaremos aqui com certeza
- Lugar perfecto, en ubicación, limpieza, tamaño, cercanía, seguridad, 100 en todo.
- Muy lindo todo.
- Great great great location, crazy to just walk out and be facing the Palace. Apt was very quiet which was great for getting a good nights sleep. Perfect home base for exploring Madrid!
- Great place to stay in an amazing location!

- Great flat for 4 people in an amazing location. Everything was as described and more. Victor was very responsive and helpful will all of our needs. If we are ever in madrid again, staying there for sure !!
- The location was lovely and peaceful. Walkable to great sites and downtown. Victor was a great host!

- "Fantastic stay! The apartment was clean, comfortable, and in the perfect location. Communication with the owner was seamless—they were super responsive and made the check-in process a breeze. Highly recommend!"

- This was the perfect apartment for anyone visiting Madrid. Easy to access, across from a park and near the royal palace. Victor was so responsive and was flexible with our check in, allowing us to leave our luggage in the flat early.
- Fantastic location Easy to walk to most places but quiet neighbourhood. Very well set up and Victor and Laura were so helpful Great place, great spot, great hosts Vamos!

- Such a lovely building in a great neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle - with the palace and gardens right outside, everything you need and really central with great transport links. Great bars and restaurants nearby. Would definitely stay again. The flat is at the back of the building so there are no views but this means it is very quiet and private, which we liked.
- It is a good choice close to Royal Palace.
- Amazing location!
- Gracias Victor, fue una estancia muy agradable
- Really lovely place
- The place was really nice. And though we had to make sudden changes in our travel plans, Victor & Laura were understanding and helped us out. Thank you!

- We were over the moon to see how close we were to the Royal Palace. Even though it is so central it is quiet and cosy. The apartment building is gorgeous and the flat is small and basic, but perfect if you’re venturing out into Madrid each day like us! Communication was quick and helpful.

- Tolle Wohnung in Top-Lage! Wir waren zu viert unterwegs und haben vor allem das geräumige Wohnzimmer und die zwei Badezimmer sehr geschätzt. Die Küche ist super ausgestattet. Das zweite Schlafzimmer hat ein etwas schmaleres Bett in der Ecke, weshalb die Wohnung ideal für drei Erwachsene ist. Alles war sauber, gemütlich und trotz der zentralen Lage mitten in Madrid absolut ruhig. Die Gastgeber sind sehr freundlich und antworten blitzschnell. Absolut zu empfehlen!

- Pros: Quiet, clean and comfortable apt. Very comfortable beds (and I am picky about this!) Great location. Appreciated Victor allowing us to drop luggage late morning prior to check-in. Plenty of outlets. Washer and dryer. Elevator. Ice trays in the freezer were a welcome touch! Having a Carrefour convenience store right next door and a chocolate & churros place 2 doors away was convenient. To Note: Toilet in the main bath had a worsening sewer smell. Toilet paper is thin and scratchy. Second bedroom is very small.

- We really like the walkable location. The unit is located on a pedestrian street. It is quite a quiet place, but also super close to good restaurants and shops. Used Callao, Opera and Sol subway stations to get around. There is a good amount of sunlight. The beds are comfortable. We like that there are 2 bathrooms.
- Really really nice host. Let us drop off luggage before check in time. Fabulous location in the centre of everything!
- Es excelente el departamento, la ubicación, todo impecable. Muy lindo

- The apartment and the location was great. It was close to several popular tourist sites. Many good restaurants within a few blocks. Bonus was having a separate dryer. Most places have a combo w/d. We recommend this as the place to stay in Madrid.
- Really nice apartment in a super cool neighborhood, walkable to everything we wanted to do in Madrid. Kitchen had all the hardware needed to cook a full meal, which we did on NYE. Highly recommend.

- Apartamento com excelente localização, bem arrumado e equipado. Instruções claras e precisas recebidas do anfitrião e que nos transmitiram segurança em todos os momentos da contratação e durante a estadia. Certamente, quando voltarmos a Madri, queremos ficar novamente neste apartamento.
- Tudo perfeito. Voltarei novamente
- Très bon séjour excellent emplacement juste des soucis avec la cafetière et un manque de torchons et pas d es pli cations pour le four rien de grave
- Fantastic apartment, In a great location. Victor was very accommodating and we were very happy with the late check out. Would recommend this property to anyone. Todd
- Excelente! Um apartamento muito confortável em uma localização perfeita! Recomendo fortemente!

- The perfect location for exploring Madrid! We really enjoyed the apartment and the hosts were very friendly and helpful. The apartment has everything you might need and is very quiet despite being so close to everything. It also has a separate clothes dryer which makes doing laundry so much easier! Highly recommend Geisha Coffee located next to the apartment and Paella at Taberna Peñalver was also excellent. Thank you, Victor. We’ll be back!
- We absolutely love our stay! Beautiful, spacious place in an amazing location. So many restaurants and very walkable. Proactive & responsive host!
- Victor fue muy comunicativo. Siempre atento. Apartamento excelente: bien ubicado, limpio, buenas dimensiones. Equipado. Volveremos. Gracias por una preciosa estadía.
- we had a great time during our stay at Victors! great location and so much to do near by. Great place for 4 people comfortably!!!

- Buena , supermercado en la puerta , varios restaurantes y cerca de la Gran Vía con muchas tiendas , es recomendable , lo difícil Fue la puerta de entrada con un código que se instala en el teléfono y nunca pudimos usamos Una llave , tendría que tener más juegos de llaves
- The apartment was spotless and in a perfect central location. The host was incredibly kind and responsive. I’d happily stay here again.

- Perfect for a few days in Madrid. So central, very close to Callao metro station but walking distance to most places. Great apartment (though agree with comments that bedroom with double bed is pretty small - but OK), comfortable, clean and quiet (mostly). And Victor and Laura were super helpful and responsive hosts. Would definitely stay again.

- This is a great two bedroom, two bathroom very comfortable apartment in the center of Madrid. We would come back. The second bedroom is small, but it has its own bathroom ensuite, so if you are a little flexible, the overall fabulousness of the apartment makes it well worth it. It has a very good kitchen and common area, especially considering, you are in the heart of Madrid.

- Exactly like the photos – clean and well laid-out. One bedroom spacious, one a bit cozy but fine. Kitchen fully equipped with dryer. Loved the convenient keypad lock. Perfect location – Carrefour Express downstairs, tons of restaurants, minutes walk to Gran Vía. Surprisingly quiet inside the apartment! Host gave detailed info before arrival and was always responsive. Highly recommend.

- Victor was extremely communicative and helpful with how we should enter the building. It was in an amazing location, super walkable with lots of cafes and food options near. The size was perfect for 4 people. We weren’t there much during the day, but it was pretty quiet around the building.

- This apartment suited our needs perfectly. Easy walking distance to main sights - eg 10 minutes to Royal Palace, 5 minutes from Gran Via. Next door to a Carrefour and a minute from a cafe serving lovely hot chocolate! Laura was very helpful and responded quickly even booking taxi transfers to/from the airport. The apartment is on the third floor - there is a lift too. Surprisingly quiet at night given its central location. We were never disturbed. The apartment had everything you might need for a long weekend away and the kitchen and bathrooms were clean. I would not hesitate to recommend.

- Le logement de Victor est idéalement situé au cœur de Madrid. Bien aménagé et très calme, c’est le lieu idéal pour visiter Madrid. Les indications et la communication avec Victor sont excellentes. Je recommande cette adresse si vous voulez visiter Madrid en étant au centre de la cité madrilène.
- Space was great. Close to everything and very walkable. Host was super helpful and responsive.
- Great apartment, location and host. Would highly recommend

- The place was perfect for us. It was in a great location, the place was very clean just like the pictures depicted. We were able to get to everything very easy by walking. We would definitely stay here again. Although Victor responded to everything we asked, the only downside was that it was a delayed response. But other than that, the place was great and we can’t wait to come back!

- We enjoyed our stay at Victor & Laura’s place. Perfect location close to Callao square, within walking distance to many shops and restaurants! Walls are thin like any apartment and there is a quiet time starting at 9pm that states you cannot wash or dry clothes at night because of the noise. Their place could use a few updates ie … new pillows, more blankets, etc… but overall the place was clean, safe, and close to everything!! Victor & Laura are great hosts and respond quickly to your questions.
- Buena localización justo 5 minutos desde la estación Callao. Lo recomiendo.

- El apartamento de Victor es excelente opción para alojarse en Madrid. La ubicación es genial, a 1 cuadra de la gran via y de plaza españa. El departamento es muy comodo, esta bien ambientado y tiene todo lo necesario para pasar unos días! Victor estuvo en contacto con nosotros en todo momento, muy amable. Sin dudas lo volveríamos a elegir! nada..

Great place in central Madrid - The apartment is bigger than the pictures let on, a really decent sized living room and good sized bedroom, with lots of seating areas and mirrors. The location was fantastic, close to several metro lines if you need them but also walkable to many major attractions and excellent food spots. Hosts were very friendly and accommodating, allowing us to drop bags off and check in earlier and check out later too. Would definitely recommend! The mattress was slightly too firm for my preference and the shower was quite small.

Apartamento súper cómodo y limpio. Muy recomendable. - Nos quedamos ya por segunda vez. El piso está estupendo para una estancia corta en pareja. Muy muy céntrico y cómodo. Es abuhardillado, solo por tenerlo en cuenta si eres una persona muy alta.
- La ubicación, en general, todo estaba bastante bien. Todo bien
Tod fue perfecto! La ubicacion, el apartamento y la comunicacion. Volveremos una vez mas! - There are no comments available for this review
- La ubicación. Al ser céntrico se encuentra cerca de las grandes atracciones turísticas.
- La ubicación y la decoración Zonas un poco bajas si eres alto
- There are no comments available for this review

- While this studio suite is in a great location, in my respectful opinion, this is not premium airbnb. We stayed for 6 nights. The location is very convenient and central. However, the problems I had with this unit are as follows: 1) The unit is quite old. Noise travelled extremely easily between neighbours. We had to be very quiet in the evenings so that neighbors did not knock on the walls. 2) We were provided with only 2 body towels for a 6 night stay. The towels were very old and poor quality. The drying machine did not work properly, even though we tried 3 times. As such, we had difficulty washing and drying our towels, let alone our clothes which we did not even attempt. 3) The Shower water would turn cold on various occasions, both at day or night. It was inconsistent water temperature. The host is very responsive and I appreciate his efforts. The location is truly excellent so it a major plus. Overall I give this a 4 out of 5 stars.

- Ci siamo relazionati quasi sempre con Laura, che si è dimostrata molto gentile. Si è offerta di prenotarci il taxi da e per l'aeroporto, fornendoci un servizio molto comodo. L'appartamento si trova a due passi da Palazzo Reale, in una zona tranquilla e sicura. Vicino ci sono un supermercato e una stazione metro. Il palazzo è datato, ma l'abitazione è stata ristrutturata, anche se necessiterebbe di qualche sostituzione. Purtroppo è poco illuminata e poco aerata, pur avendo alcune finestre, perchè queste danno su un cortile interno piuttosto angusto.

- Victor and Laura were communicative before we arrived but they never met us at the unit. We figured everything out in the end. The best part was the location. It's walkable to everything. It was clean inside and quiet. The vanities in the bathrooms needs updating and the kitchen need some work. Overall we had a good experience.

- Our stay at Victors apartment was good. The apartment is as described and what it looks like in the pictures. That being said, the apartment was smaller than what we were expecting. Other reviews mention “cozy” apartment, and it is cozy. The location is great and I am not sure you can do any better. No view from the apartment window which may be a good thing if you don’t want to hear the street noise. Unfortunately for us, and certainly not within Victors control, is the noise in the apartment building. Walls are thin and you certainly get to know your surrounding neighbors whether you want to or not. If you are a light sleeper, this is probably not the place for you if you want to sleep late. Overall, good apartment in a great location, with a very responsive host, but the noise level within the apartment building was too much for us.

- A hospedagem é muito boa, o local é limpo, organizado e corresponde ao anunciado. A comunicação também foi tranquila. Minha única observação é em relação às portas do quarto e do banheiro, que são de vidro temperado, sem tranca e com pouca privacidade. O vidro é parcialmente transparente, então quem está na sala consegue ver quem está utilizando o banheiro, o que pode causar desconforto para alguns hóspedes. Fora esse detalhe, tive uma boa experiência e recomendo a hospedagem.
- Great location… great check in details. Good shower. Our host Victor was very responsive to our questions Thank you 🙏

- El departamento de Víctor estaba muy bueno, ubicación excelente, limpio, con las prestaciones necesarias. Víctor muy amable estuvo muy comunicativo siempre. El dormitorio principal es súper amplio, las camas muy cómodas. Los baños están bien. El único comentario es que el segundo dormitorio es demasiado pequeño, por lo demás todo excelente, gracias Víctor

- Logement idéal pour 3 couples. Marché de producteurs à pieds très appréciable. Quartier vivant hors de la zone touristique et très proche du magnifique parc Retiro. Nous n’avons pas pu profiter de la petite terrasse à cause de la météo maussade.

- Daireye giriş İçin gerekli talimatlar uygun biçimde geldi.Daire kullanışlı çok yeni değil.Callao meydanına çok yakın etrafında market ve restoranlar oldukça fazla var.Merkezi bir yer.Çıkış saatimizi biraz geç yapmak istedik yeni müşteri geleceği için müsade etmediler.Bagajlarımızı dışarda kilitli bir yere koyduk ekstra para ödedik.

- Great stay, whilst visiting family. Location is excellent with quick walk to many shops, restaurants and the metro. Lara very kindly allowed us to drop our luggage off before the property was ready so we could go and explore. Very easy area to Uber from if needed. The property itself was clean, tidy, well presented and spacious. Just a few issues with a “full” house of 6 guests, there was not the quantity of some things, for example only 3 wine glasses, 4 mugs, 5 chairs and 4 chairs outside. The upstairs bedroom has a downstairs bathroom which is fine but no mirror in the bedroom. These are feedback points to definitely enhance the stay. Beds are comfortable and the black out blinds are excellent, so slept well.
- Very nice place, great location. Would return.
- Really great location, nice clean flat, air con and heating to make the temperature right any time of year
- Bra leilighet som oppleves som bilder og beskrivelsen i annonsen. Rent og ryddig- god og nyttig kommunikasjon. Stille nabolag som lett å finne fram i . Anbefales
- Amazing location, very comfortable, and good communication.

- we have stayed for 3 nights with 3 adults and 1 child; and the best part of the home is the location. when you are out of home, feeling to be near of the royal palace was perfect. the cleanliness and the stuff at home was also sufficient. the only thing i would re-consider if i be staying again at this house is the lack of sunlight. this is very personal but i prefer a house with sunlight otherwise the feeling while we are home, does not make us feel good. (there are windows at home but only looking to common space between the buildings.

- Super séjour et emplacement de rêve. Je regrette juste que l’appartement soit sur cour et si peu lumineux. Mais il est parfait pour 3 ou 4 personnes, et la proximité avec le palais Real et de tout ce qu’il faut avoir vu à Madrid rendent ce logement attractif
- Excelente, todo acorde a lo que describe la publicación y otras personas... nada fuera de lugar. volveria.

- El departamento tiene una ubicación excelente, ideal para recorrer Madrid. Estaba muy limpio al llegar, lo cual se agradece. Un punto muy positivo es que cuenta con persianas, lo que nos permitió descansar muy bien sin que entrara luz en las habitaciones. Si bien el alojamiento cumplió, en las fotos se veía más cuidado, amplio y con más detalles; en persona resulta bastante más básico. Los baños son pequeños y se ven más modernos y espaciosos en las imágenes. En general, el departamento se nota algo antiguo y podría beneficiarse de una actualización. De todas formas, el anfitrión fue muy atento: nos cambió rápidamente unas almohadas gastadas, nos ayudó a coordinar traslados al aeropuerto y nos permitió hacer late check-out, lo cual fue muy útil. En general, una experiencia positiva para una estadía corta.
- This flat is in a great location, very close to everything and on a cool street. The photos are accurate and the flat is comfortable.

- Leuk gezellig apprtement in Madrid. Genoeg restaurantjes met terrasjes in de buurt. Supermarkt ook on de hoek. Zeker ook lopen naar het centrum te doen en aanteraden want zo zie je ook weer genoeg. Aanrader!

- Victor was a very responsive host who immediately took care of an issue we had. Very good service. The only issue we had was with upstairs construction during our stay which was not Victors fault. Great location!
- Victor e Laura foram extremamente gentis e flexiveis. O apto é bem localizado e descrito conforme o anúncio.

Inicio de año en Madrid - El departamento en general es muy bonito, amplio a pesar de la baja altura (entendible siendo un atico), muy buena ubicacion. El lugar seria un 10 si no fuera por el baño, la regadera es exageradamente pequeña tanto horizontal como verticalmente, la ubicacion del WC tambien es muy raro, y eso en general le quita muchos puntos a la estancia, hay formas de mejorarlo definitivamente, pero dependera supongo del dueño.
Tappa in Madrid - Appartamento dotato di tutte le comoditá. Zona ottima. Host molto disponibili e davvero gentili.

- The location is excellent, right in the centre and close to a metro station, making it easy to get around. The apartment having a lift is a bonus! Communication with the host was great throughout the stay. The check-in and check-out process was simple and smooth, which made everything stress-free. The apartment maintains a great temperature in both hot and cold days, adding to the overall comfort. It was clean and felt safe. Some small maintenance details, mainly general wear and tear, could benefit from a bit of attention. There was also a little mould in the shower - that can easily be fixed. Additionally, as the building is older, the walls are quite thin, so some noise from neighbours can occasionally be heard, which might be noticeable for light sleepers. That said, these were relatively minor compared to the overall experience. It remains a great option for location, comfort, and convenience, with only a few small areas that could be improved.

- The location is excellent, right in the centre and close to a metro station, making it easy to get around. The apartment having a lift is a bonus! Communication with the host was great throughout the stay. The check-in and check-out process was simple and smooth, which made everything stress-free. The apartment maintains a great temperature in both hot and cold days, adding to the overall comfort. It was clean and felt safe. Some small maintenance details, mainly general wear and tear, could benefit from a bit of attention. There was also a little mould in the shower - that can easily be fixed. Additionally, as the building is older, the walls are quite thin, so some noise from neighbours can occasionally be heard, which might be noticeable for light sleepers. That said, these were relatively minor compared to the overall experience. It remains a great option for location, comfort, and convenience, with only a few small areas that could be improved.
Tappa in Madrid - Appartamento dotato di tutte le comoditá. Zona ottima. Host molto disponibili e davvero gentili.

- Communication with hosts was clear and friendly, excellent location well connected to plenty of public transit, bars, restaurants/cafes, supermarkets. Space was comfortable and clean, A/C and wifi worked great. Sloping ceilings and bathroom door frame were low for someone over 6ft. This isn't a complaint about the space, the apartment is depicted accurately the photos - just something to note for tall guests!

Inicio de año en Madrid - El departamento en general es muy bonito, amplio a pesar de la baja altura (entendible siendo un atico), muy buena ubicacion. El lugar seria un 10 si no fuera por el baño, la regadera es exageradamente pequeña tanto horizontal como verticalmente, la ubicacion del WC tambien es muy raro, y eso en general le quita muchos puntos a la estancia, hay formas de mejorarlo definitivamente, pero dependera supongo del dueño.

Rapporto qualità prezzo da migliorare - Un appartamento accogliente e arredato con carattere (non con i soliti mobili IKEA per capirci). L'area soggiorno con tv, divano e scrivania è veramente bella e invita a rilassarsi. Anche se molto vecchia, la lavatrice è comoda così come asse e ferro da stiro. La posizione è eccellente, vicinissima a Plaza de España e alle fermate del trasporto pubblico e in un quartiere tranquillo, ma pieno di ristoranti, soprattutto asiatici. Davvero ideale! Nonostante il caldo, le finestre aperte la sera e la mattina presto mantenevano l'appartamento fresco. L'appartamento purtroppo non era pulito a dovere, c'erano polvere in alcuni punti della casa, piatti unti e cassetti del comò da aspirare. In cucina c'è il necessario per cucinare, tuttavia alcune pentole non erano in buone condizioni. Negli armadietti c'erano spezie scadute e confezioni di sale aperte. La lavastoviglie manca, così come un'aspirapolvere che, in un soggiorno di una settimana, prima o poi serve. Nel complesso 180 € a notte li ho trovati inadeguati per ciò che l'appartamento offre.
Muy bien para unos días solo - Es espacioso Todo muy bien, el baño es simple

lastPos.txt: - fantastic experience! such a lovely clean and spacious house in a really nice neighbourhood - was exactly what we were looking for! great for if you’re visiting with a car as well. overall the stay was fantastic and we’d love to stay again!
